finetuneHeader.value: Fine-tuning Parameters

useLora.label: Use LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation)
useLora.name: use_lora
useLora.help: Enable parameter-efficient fine-tuning with LoRA. Disable for full model fine-tuning (requires more memory).

learningRate.label: Learning Rate
learningRate.name: learning_rate
learningRate.help: The initial learning rate for the AdamW optimizer.

epochs.label: Training Epochs
epochs.name: num_train_epochs
epochs.help: Total number of training epochs to perform.

batchSize.label: Batch Size
batchSize.name: per_device_train_batch_size
batchSize.help: The batch size per GPU/CPU for training.

loraHeader.value: LoRA Configuration

lora_r.label: LoRA Rank (r)
lora_r.name: lora_r
lora_r.help: The rank of the LoRA update matrices. A higher rank means more trainable parameters.

lora_alpha.label: LoRA Alpha
lora_alpha.name: lora_alpha
lora_alpha.help: The scaling factor for the LoRA matrices. A common practice is to set this to 2 * r.

lora_dropout.label: LoRA Dropout
lora_dropout.name: lora_dropout
lora_dropout.help: Dropout probability for the LoRA layers.

showAdvancedFinetune.label: Advanced Parameters
showAdvancedFinetune.name: show_advanced_finetune
showAdvancedFinetune.help: Specify any other training arguments from the Hugging Face Trainer in JSON format.

customFinetuneParams.label: Advanced Parameters
customFinetuneParams.name: custom_finetune_params
customFinetuneParams.help: Advanced training hyperparameters in JSON format (e.g., weight_decay, lr_scheduler_type, gradient_accumulation_steps).
